info.title: Discobot Server API
info.description:
Authoritative contract for the Discobot server HTTP API. This schema is
generated from the existing server route table and public Go DTOs, and is
intended to become the source for generated server/client code.

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Health checks, server configuration, diagnostic information, and route metadata.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Browser authentication session endpoints for login, logout, callback handling, and current-user discovery.

tags.name: Projects
tags.description: Project lifecycle and project-scoped helper endpoints.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Project event streams over Server-Sent Events and WebSocket transports.

tags.name: Models
tags.description: Model catalog endpoints available within a project.

tags.name: Workspaces
tags.description: Workspace lifecycle and sandbox provider status for workspaces.

tags.name: Git
tags.description: Git repository inspection and mutation operations for workspaces.

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Agent session lifecycle, commands, and session-level state.

tags.name: Threads
tags.description: Session thread lifecycle, prompt queues, and usage metadata.

tags.name: Chat
tags.description: Chat submission, streaming, cancellation, and interactive question endpoints.

tags.name: Files
tags.description: Session and artifact file browsing, reading, writing, searching, and diff endpoints.

tags.name: Terminal
tags.description: Interactive terminal WebSocket and terminal status endpoints.

tags.name: Hooks
tags.description: Session hook status, state, output, download, and rerun endpoints.

tags.name: Services
tags.description: Session service listing, control, localhost binding, and output streaming.

tags.name: Credentials
tags.description: Project credential configuration, assignment, validation, and OAuth/device-code flows.

tags.name: Sandbox Providers
tags.description: Project sandbox provider type, instance, resource, and inspection endpoints.

tags.name: Resources
tags.description: Project-level runtime resources, cache volumes, and inspection metadata.

ProjectID.name: projectId
ProjectID.description: Project identifier used to scope the request.

UserID.name: userId
UserID.description: User identifier for a project member.

Provider.name: provider
Provider.description: Credential provider name or credential identifier, depending on the endpoint.

PreferenceKey.name: key
PreferenceKey.description: Preference key to read, set, or delete.

InvitationToken.name: token
InvitationToken.description: Invitation token issued for a project invitation.

QueueID.name: queueId
QueueID.description: Queued prompt identifier within the thread prompt queue.

AnyObject.description: Arbitrary JSON object used when a response shape is intentionally open-ended.

error.description: Error message when the operation failed.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard JSON error envelope returned by failed API operations.

MessageResponse.description: Generic action result message used by endpoints that do not return a dedicated resource.

HealthResponse.description: Liveness response returned by the health endpoint.
